IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: The QLaw Foundation of Washington promotes the dignity and respect of LGBTQ+ Washingtonians within the legal system through advocacy education and legal assistance.
IRS990.MissionDesc: The QLaw Foundation promotes the dignity and respect of LGBTQ+ Washingtonians within the legal system through advocacy education and legal assistance.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: QLaw Foundation engages in minimal public education and communication with legislators on legislative matters related to our mission of serving LGBTQ+ civil and legal rights. Those activities comprise a maximum of 2% of staff hours equivalent to $1700 of staff salary.

QLaw Foundation engages in minimal public education and communication with legislators on legislative matters related to our mission of serving LGBTQ+ civil and legal rights. Those activities comprise a maximum of 2% of staff hours equivalent to $1700 of staff salary.

QLaw Foundation engages in minimal public education and communication with legislators on legislative matters related to our mission of serving LGBTQ+ civil and legal rights. Those activities comprise a maximum of 2% of staff hours equivalent to $1700 of staff salary.
Prior to filing the form 990 was reviewed by the Executive Director and Board Treasurer. Copies were provided to all members of the Board of Directors.
The Board of Directors surveyed other Washington nonprofits of similar size as well as inflation data and arrived at a compensation commensurate with the organization's budget.
